method_description: Make chemical products residual incumbent placeholder carrying allocated manufacturing energy inputs, IPPU process emissions, and folded incumbent industrial process heat (low and medium temperature fossil shares from the retired generic heat roles) through normal role-method fields.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated manufacturing and IPPU residual calibration layer and official Australian energy and inventory closure totals.
derivation_method: Mechanical equal split of former residual manufacturing energy inputs and residual IPPU process emissions into explicit material transformation roles, plus an indicative allocation of the retired generic industrial heat baseline (chemicals: 40% low + 50% medium temperature; other materials: 60% low + 50% medium + 100% high temperature with cement kiln heat separately accounted) using the 2025 incumbent fossil heat fuel mix.
review_notes: Residual stub for closure and scenario accounting, not an optimisable technology representation.
